name: historymap
description: Static site generator for a company-style product history timeline (zigzag layout), deployable to GitHub Pages and embeddable via iframe.

scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build:all && rm -rf dist-worker && mkdir -p dist-worker/products/historymap && cp -r dist/. dist-worker/products/historymap/ && cp dist/index.html dist-worker/index.html && wrangler deploy
